meta.title: IPIP-NEO (120)
meta.subtitle: A longer Big Five profile for domain-level personality assessment.
meta.description: A 120-item inventory using IPIP/NEO-style trait statements. Domain scores are reported in this release.
meta.disclaimer: This assessment supports self-reflection and does not provide a clinical diagnosis.

consent.title: Consent and Disclaimer
consent.body: I understand this is a self-reflection tool, not a clinical test, and I consent to store results locally on this device.

interpretation.low: Lower domain range in your current responses.
interpretation.medium: Mid domain range in your current responses.
interpretation.high: Higher domain range in your current responses.

notes.facetsTodo: Facet scoring is prepared in architecture and can be enabled when facet keys are added.

items.neo120_001: I see myself as someone who is emotionally reactive.
items.neo120_002: I see myself as someone who is worried about mistakes.
items.neo120_003: I see myself as someone who is tense in uncertainty.
items.neo120_004: I see myself as someone who is sensitive to criticism.
items.neo120_005: I see myself as someone who is easily discouraged.
items.neo120_006: I see myself as someone who is moody under stress.
items.neo120_007: I see myself as someone who is self-conscious in groups.
items.neo120_008: I see myself as someone who is focused on potential risks.
items.neo120_009: I see myself as someone who is prone to rumination.
items.neo120_010: I see myself as someone who is easily upset.
items.neo120_011: I see myself as someone who is sensitive to rejection.
items.neo120_012: I see myself as someone who is concerned about the future.

items.neo120_018: I see myself as someone who is balanced under pressure.
items.neo120_019: I see myself as someone who is confident in uncertainty.
items.neo120_020: I see myself as someone who is slow to panic.

items.neo120_024: I see myself as someone who is hard to rattle.
items.neo120_025: I see myself as someone who is outgoing.

items.neo120_028: I see myself as someone who is assertive.
items.neo120_029: I see myself as someone who is enthusiastic around others.
items.neo120_030: I see myself as someone who is comfortable leading conversations.

items.neo120_034: I see myself as someone who is excited by group activities.

items.neo120_038: I see myself as someone who is quiet in groups.
items.neo120_039: I see myself as someone who is private about feelings.
items.neo120_040: I see myself as someone who is slow to approach strangers.
items.neo120_041: I see myself as someone who is comfortable being alone.
items.neo120_042: I see myself as someone who is low-key in social settings.
items.neo120_043: I see myself as someone who is unlikely to seek spotlight.
items.neo120_044: I see myself as someone who is gentle in social presence.
items.neo120_045: I see myself as someone who is reflective before speaking.
items.neo120_046: I see myself as someone who is more listener than speaker.
items.neo120_047: I see myself as someone who is reluctant to self-promote.
items.neo120_048: I see myself as someone who is focused on deep one-to-one conversations.
items.neo120_049: I see myself as someone who is curious about new ideas.
items.neo120_050: I see myself as someone who is imaginative.
items.neo120_051: I see myself as someone who is drawn to art and beauty.
items.neo120_052: I see myself as someone who is intellectually adventurous.
items.neo120_053: I see myself as someone who is comfortable with abstract thought.
items.neo120_054: I see myself as someone who is interested in different perspectives.
items.neo120_055: I see myself as someone who is creative in problem solving.

items.neo120_057: I see myself as someone who is reflective about meaning.
items.neo120_058: I see myself as someone who is eager to learn unfamiliar topics.

items.neo120_060: I see myself as someone who is willing to revise old assumptions.
items.neo120_061: I see myself as someone who is prefers practical routines.

items.neo120_063: I see myself as someone who is uninterested in symbolic meaning.
